<?php /** * sect193r1 * * PHP version 5 and 7 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2017 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://pear.php.net/package/Math_BigInteger */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\Curves; use phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\BaseCurves\Binary; use phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger; class sect193r1 extends Binary { public function __construct() { $this->setModulo(193, 15, 0); $this->setCoefficients( '0017858FEB7A98975169E171F77B4087DE098AC8A911DF7B01', '00FDFB49BFE6C3A89FACADAA7A1E5BBC7CC1C2E5D831478814' ); $this->setBasePoint( '01F481BC5F0FF84A74AD6CDF6FDEF4BF6179625372D8C0C5E1', '0025E399F2903712CCF3EA9E3A1AD17FB0B3201B6AF7CE1B05' ); $this->setOrder(new BigInteger('01000000000000000000000000C7F34A778F443ACC920EBA49', 16)); } }
